replaceString:
[BATTLE_START]
参战方先攻（角色A先攻值,角色B先攻值,角色C先攻值…）
先攻顺位$1
当前为第几回合
回合序号$2
展开：先攻顺位全文
$1
战斗开始，先攻顺位与回合已登记。

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>状态面板</title>
    <meta name="description" content="战斗系统v3.0 [STATUS]">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Exo+2:wght@500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=Orbitron:wght@500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/font-awesome@4.7.0/css/font-awesome.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
        html {
            height: auto;
            max-height: min(82vh, 920px);
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Exo 2', 'Inter', sans-serif;
            background: transparent;
            color: #e8eaf7;
            display: block;
            padding: 0.3rem 0.35rem;
            margin: 0;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            font-size: 15px;
            line-height: 1.35;
            max-height: min(82vh, 920px);
            overflow-x: hidden;
            overflow-y: auto;
            -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
            overscroll-behavior: contain;
        }
        @keyframes cbTitlePulse {
            0%, 100% { filter: brightness(1) drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.55)); }
            50% { filter: brightness(1.08) drop-shadow(0 0 14px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.85)); }
        }
        @keyframes cbNeonPulse {
            0%, 100% {
                box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.32), 0 0 26px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.1),
                    0 0 0 1px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.42), 0 0 0 2px rgba(255, 0, 180, 0.1),
                    inset 0 0 18px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.06), inset 0 0 40px rgba(255, 0, 160, 0.025);
            }
            50% {
                box-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.45), 0 0 36px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.16),
                    0 0 0 1px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.58), 0 0 0 2px rgba(255, 0, 200, 0.18),
                    inset 0 0 24px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.08), inset 0 0 52px rgba(255, 0, 180, 0.04);
            }
        }
        @keyframes cbScanMove {
            0% { transform: translateY(-100%); opacity: 0; }
            8% { opacity: 0.85; }
            92% { opacity: 0.85; }
            100% { transform: translateY(2800%); opacity: 0; }
        }
        @keyframes cbShimmer {
            0% { background-position: -200% 0; }
            100% { background-position: 200% 0; }
        }
        @keyframes cbChipGlow {
            0%, 100% { filter: brightness(1); box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.35), 0 0 16px rgba(255, 0, 180, 0.08); }
            50% { filter: brightness(1.12); box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.55), 0 0 22px rgba(255, 0, 200, 0.15); }
        }
        .cb-card.cb-card-status {
            --cb-a: 0, 240, 255;
            --cb-mag: 255, 0, 170;
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 900px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            height: auto;
            min-height: 0;
            overflow: visible;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 0.22rem;
            background-color: rgba(6, 4, 18, 0.94);
            background-image:
                radial-gradient(ellipse 100% 80% at 0% -20%, rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.22), transparent 55%),
                radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 50% at 100% 110%, rgba(var(--cb-mag), 0.14), transparent 50%),
                radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.04), transparent 65%),
                repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 13px, rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.035) 13px, rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.035) 14px),
                repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, transparent 13px, rgba(var(--cb-mag), 0.025) 13px, rgba(var(--cb-mag), 0.025) 14px);
            backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
            border-radius: 11px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.5);
            padding: 0.48rem 0.62rem 0.45rem;
            position: relative;
            animation: cbNeonPulse 4.5s ease-in-out infinite;
            max-height: none !important;
        }
        .cb-card.cb-card-status::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            border-radius: 11px;
            pointer-events: none;
            background:
                linear-gradient(125deg, rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.12) 0%, transparent 42%, transparent 58%, rgba(var(--cb-mag), 0.08) 100%),
                linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 48%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03) 50%, transparent 52%);
            background-size: 100% 100%, 200% 100%;
            animation: cbShimmer 8s ease-in-out infinite;
        }
        .cb-card.cb-card-status::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            left: 4%;
            right: 4%;
            top: 0;
            height: 3px;
            border-radius: 2px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.95), rgba(255, 240, 120, 0.5), rgba(var(--cb-mag), 0.85), transparent);
            box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.8), 0 0 24px rgba(var(--cb-mag), 0.35);
            opacity: 0.75;
            pointer-events: none;
            animation: cbScanMove 5.5s linear infinite;
        }
        .cb-head {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 0.28rem 0.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 0.15rem;
            padding-bottom: 0.32rem;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 2;
            background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.9), rgba(var(--cb-mag), 0.45), rgba(255, 240, 120, 0.25), transparent 72%);
            background-size: 100% 2px;
            background-position: left bottom;
            background-repeat: no-repeat;
        }
        .cb-head::after {
            content: '';
            display: none;
        }
        .cb-tag {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.35rem;
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: rgb(var(--cb-a));
            text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.75), 0 0 24px rgba(var(--cb-mag), 0.35), 0 0 2px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4);
            filter: drop-shadow(0 0 4px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.6));
        }
        .cb-tag i.fa {
            font-size: 0.88rem;
            color: rgba(255, 250, 200, 0.95);
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(var(--cb-a), 1), 0 0 18px rgba(var(--cb-mag), 0.6);
        }
        .cb-tag span {
            font-family: 'Orbitron', 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-weight: 700;
            letter-spacing: 0.14em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            font-size: 0.66rem;
            animation: cbTitlePulse 3.2s ease-in-out infinite;
        }
        .cb-body {
            flex: 0 0 auto;
            min-width: 0;
            overflow-x: auto;
            overflow-y: visible;
            -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 2;
            padding-right: 2px;
        }
        .cb-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(64px, 28%) minmax(0, 1fr);
            gap: 0.28rem 0.5rem;
            font-size: 0.76rem;
            line-height: 1.32;
            min-width: 0;
            padding: 0.32rem 0.4rem;
            border-radius: 8px;
            background: linear-gradient(165deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45), rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.04));
            border: 1px solid rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.2);
            box-shadow: inset 0 0 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
        }
        .cb-k {
            color: #d0dcff;
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            line-height: 1.28;
            align-self: start;
            padding-top: 0.06rem;
            padding-left: 0.28rem;
            border-left: 2px solid rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.35);
            text-shadow: 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.85), 0 0 14px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.35);
        }
        .cb-k::before {
            content: '▸';
            margin-right: 0.28rem;
            color: rgba(var(--cb-mag), 0.75);
            font-size: 0.65rem;
            text-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(var(--cb-mag), 0.8);
        }
        .cb-v {
            color: #fafbff;
            font-weight: 600;
            overflow-wrap: anywhere;
            word-break: break-word;
            font-family: 'Exo 2', ui-monospace, 'Cascadia Code', monospace;
            user-select: text;
            min-width: 0;
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            align-items: baseline;
            gap: 0.28rem 0.4rem;
            text-shadow: 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9), 0 0 10px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.3), 0 0 18px rgba(255, 0, 180, 0.06);
        }
        .cb-chip {
            flex: 0 0 auto;
            font-family: 'Orbitron', 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 0.52rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: 0.07em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            padding: 0.12rem 0.36rem;
            border-radius: 3px;
            clip-path: polygon(6px 0, 100% 0, 100% calc(100% - 6px), calc(100% - 6px) 100%, 0 100%, 0 6px);
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.35), rgba(var(--cb-mag), 0.15));
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96);
            border: 1px solid rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.55);
            animation: cbChipGlow 2.8s ease-in-out infinite;
        }
        .cb-valtxt {
            flex: 1 1 10rem;
            min-width: 0;
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.02em;
        }
        .cb-foot {
            font-size: 0.6rem;
            color: #7a8ab0;
            text-align: right;
            margin-top: 0.28rem;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 2;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
            text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.25);
        }
        .cb-foot::before {
            content: '✦ ';
            color: rgb(var(--cb-a));
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.9);
        }
        .cb-foot::after {
            content: ' ✦';
            color: rgba(var(--cb-mag), 0.85);
            text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(var(--cb-mag), 0.7);
        }
        .cb-fold {
            margin-top: 0.08rem;
            border-radius: 7px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.35);
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5), rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.06));
            position: relative;
            z-index: 2;
            overflow: visible;
            box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.12), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
        }
        .cb-sum {
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 0.32rem 0.5rem;
            font-size: 0.66rem;
            font-family: 'Orbitron', 'Inter', sans-serif;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
            color: rgb(var(--cb-a));
            list-style: none;
            user-select: none;
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.5);
        }
        .cb-sum::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
        .cb-sum::before { content: '⬡ '; opacity: 0.9; color: rgba(255, 230, 120, 0.9); text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.8); }
        details[open] > .cb-sum::before { content: '⬢ '; }
        .cb-long {
            padding: 0 0.48rem 0.45rem;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            line-height: 1.38;
            color: #f0f2ff;
            overflow-wrap: anywhere;
            word-break: break-word;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            font-family: 'Exo 2', ui-monospace, 'Cascadia Code', monospace;
            font-weight: 500;
            max-height: none;
            overflow: visible;
            user-select: text;
            border-top: 1px dashed rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.25);
            margin-top: 0.1rem;
            text-shadow: 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.85), 0 0 10px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.22);
        }
        .cb-sum:hover {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.15), rgba(var(--cb-mag), 0.06));
        }
        .cb-sum:focus { outline: 1px dashed rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.6); outline-offset: 2px; }
        .cb-strap {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 2;
            margin: 0 0 0.25rem 0;
            padding: 0.32rem 0.5rem 0.32rem 0.55rem;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            line-height: 1.38;
            font-weight: 500;
            letter-spacing: 0.04em;
            color: rgba(255, 252, 245, 0.95);
            background: linear-gradient(92deg, rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.28), rgba(var(--cb-mag), 0.08), transparent 88%);
            border-left: 4px solid rgb(var(--cb-a));
            border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
            box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.2), inset 0 0 14px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.025);
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.3);
        }
        .cb-strap::before {
            content: '⚡';
            margin-right: 0.28rem;
            filter: drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(255, 240, 100, 0.9));
        }
        
        body:has(.cb-card.cb-card-status) {
            padding-top: 0.4rem;
            padding-bottom: 0.25rem;
        }
        .cb-status-raw {
            position: absolute !important;
            width: 1px;
            height: 1px;
            padding: 0;
            margin: -1px;
            overflow: hidden;
            clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0);
            border: 0;
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
        }
        .cb-status-cards { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.38rem; }
        .cb-unit-card {
            padding: 0.35rem 0.48rem;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.3);
            background: linear-gradient(165deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.48), rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.08));
            box-shadow: inset 0 0 14px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.32);
        }
        .cb-unit-name {
            font-family: 'Orbitron', 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
            color: rgb(var(--cb-a));
            text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.5);
            margin-bottom: 0.28rem;
            padding-bottom: 0.22rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.22);
        }
        .cb-unit-stats {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 0.2rem 0.4rem;
            align-items: baseline;
        }
        .cb-stat-cell {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            align-items: baseline;
            gap: 0.22rem 0.32rem;
            min-width: 0;
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            line-height: 1.28;
            cursor: help;
            padding: 0.08rem 0;
            border-left: 2px solid rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.14);
            padding-left: 0.28rem;
        }
        .cb-stat-cell--full { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
        .cb-stat-line {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            align-items: baseline;
            gap: 0.35rem 0.5rem;
            margin: 0.12rem 0;
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            line-height: 1.28;
        }
        .cb-mini-chip {
            display: inline-block;
            font-family: 'Orbitron', 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 0.5rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
            padding: 0.08rem 0.28rem;
            border-radius: 3px;
            background: rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.24);
            border: 1px solid rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.45);
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.93);
            box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.15);
        }
        .cb-statv {
            color: #f0f2ff;
            font-family: 'Exo 2', ui-monospace, monospace;
            font-size: 0.76rem;
            text-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.22);
        }
        .cb-status-fallback {
            margin: 0.22rem 0 0;
            padding: 0.38rem 0.45rem;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            line-height: 1.32;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            word-break: break-word;
            border-radius: 8px;
            background: linear-gradient(165deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5), rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.05));
            border: 1px solid rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.22);
            color: #e8eaff;
            font-family: 'Exo 2', ui-monospace, monospace;
            max-height: min(44vh, 480px);
            overflow-y: auto;
            -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
        }
        .cb-status-legend-fold {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 2;
            margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.32);
            background: linear-gradient(95deg, rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.2), rgba(var(--cb-mag), 0.07));
            box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.08);
        }
        .cb-status-legend-fold > summary {
            cursor: pointer;
            list-style: none;
            padding: 0.32rem 0.45rem;
            font-size: 0.65rem;
            line-height: 1.35;
            color: rgba(230, 238, 255, 0.95);
            text-shadow: 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8), 0 0 8px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.2);
            font-family: 'Orbitron', 'Exo 2', sans-serif;
            letter-spacing: 0.04em;
        }
        .cb-status-legend-fold > summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
        .cb-status-legend-fold > summary::before {
            content: '⬡ ';
            color: rgba(255, 230, 120, 0.85);
            text-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.7);
        }
        details[open].cb-status-legend-fold > summary::before { content: '⬢ '; }
        .cb-legend-tip {
            font-family: 'Inter', 'Exo 2', sans-serif;
            font-size: 0.58rem;
            font-weight: 400;
            letter-spacing: 0.02em;
            color: rgba(180, 198, 235, 0.88);
        }
        .cb-status-legend-body {
            padding: 0 0.48rem 0.4rem;
            font-size: 0.62rem;
            line-height: 1.4;
            color: rgba(210, 220, 248, 0.94);
            font-family: 'Inter', 'Exo 2', sans-serif;
            border-top: 1px dashed rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.22);
        }
        .cb-status-legend-body strong {
            font-family: 'Orbitron', 'Exo 2', sans-serif;
            color: rgb(var(--cb-a));
        }
        .cb-status-legend-body code {
            font-size: 0.58rem;
            padding: 0.04rem 0.22rem;
            border-radius: 3px;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);
            color: rgba(255, 230, 160, 0.95);
        }
        .cb-stat-block {
            margin: 0.08rem 0 0.2rem;
            padding-left: 0.22rem;
            border-left: 2px solid rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.2);
        }
        .cb-stat-hint {
            display: block;
            margin-top: 0.08rem;
            font-size: 0.58rem;
            line-height: 1.3;
            color: rgba(175, 192, 235, 0.9);
            font-family: 'Inter', 'Exo 2', sans-serif;
            font-weight: 400;
            text-shadow: 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.75), 0 0 6px rgba(var(--cb-a), 0.1);
        }
        .cb-card.cb-card-status {
            isolation: isolate;
            transform: translateZ(0);
            -webkit-transform: translateZ(0);
            animation: none;
            backdrop-filter: none;
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: none;
            backface-visibility: hidden;
            -webkit-backface-visibility: hidden;
            margin: 0.15rem auto 0;
        }
        .cb-card.cb-card-status::before {
            animation: none;
        }
        .cb-card.cb-card-status::after {
            display: none;
            content: none;
            animation: none;
        }
        .cb-card.cb-card-status .cb-tag {
            filter: none;
        }
        .cb-card.cb-card-status .cb-tag span {
            animation: none;
        }
        .cb-card.cb-card-status .cb-mini-chip {
            animation: none;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <section class="cb-card cb-card-status">
        <div class="cb-head">
            <div class="cb-tag">
                <i class="fa fa-crosshairs"></i>
                <span>[STATUS]</span>
            </div>
            
        </div>
        
        <div class="cb-body">
            <details class="cb-status-legend-fold" role="note">
                <summary><strong>步骤二 · 战况面板</strong> <span class="cb-legend-tip">（点击展开 · 悬停数值格可看说明）</span></summary>
                <div class="cb-status-legend-body">每轮开始输出：<b>角色名</b>，<b>HP当前</b>，<b>HP最大</b>，<b>MP当前</b>，<b>MP最大</b>，<b>AC</b>，<b>状态</b>；多人用 <code>|</code> 分隔。若中间仍是长串原文，多为酒馆未执行卡片内嵌脚本（分角色卡片需脚本）；请检查扩展/设置是否允许 HTML 内 JS。剧情里请勿单独起一行三个反引号（Markdown 代码围栏），否则会打断后续正文。</div>
            </details>
            <textarea class="cb-status-raw" readonly aria-hidden="true">$1</textarea>
            <div class="cb-status-cards"></div>
            <pre class="cb-status-fallback">$1</pre>
        </div>
    <script>
    (function () {
        var sc = document.currentScript;
        var root = sc && sc.closest && sc.closest(".cb-card");
        if (!root) return;
        var ta = root.querySelector("textarea.cb-status-raw");
        var host = root.querySelector(".cb-status-cards");
        if (!ta || !host) return;
        var raw = (ta.value || "").replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, "");
        if (!raw) return;
        var labs = ["HP 当前", "HP 最大", "MP 当前", "MP 最大", "AC"];
        var hints = [
            "【生命】随受伤减少；归零将进入濒死或离场。",
            "【上限】生命峰值；治疗与休整通常不可超过此数。",
            "【资源】施法、战技等消耗的法力或同类资源。",
            "【MP 上限】法力等资源的最大可持有量。",
            "【AC】护甲等级；敌人攻击你时需掷骰与此对照（见步骤三检定）。",
            "【状态】中毒、失衡等；可能修正检定、伤害与行动。"
        ];
        function esc(s) {
            return String(s)
                .replace(/&/g, "&")
                .replace(/</g, "<")
                .replace(/>/g, ">")
                .replace(/"/g, """);
        }
        raw.split("|").forEach(function (seg) {
            seg = seg.replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, "");
            if (!seg) return;
            var p = seg.split(/[,，]/);
            var card = document.createElement("div");
            card.className = "cb-unit-card";
            if (p.length < 7) {
                card.innerHTML =
                    '<div class="cb-unit-name">' +
                    esc(p[0] || "—") +
                    '</div><div class="cb-stat-block"><div class="cb-stat-line"><span class="cb-mini-chip">原始</span><span class="cb-statv">' +
                    esc(p.slice(1).join(",")) +
                    '</span></div><span class="cb-stat-hint">需 7 段数据（角色,HP,HPmax,MP,MPmax,AC,状态）；请按协议用英文逗号或中文逗号分隔。</span></div>';
                host.appendChild(card);
                return;
            }
            var name = p[0];
            var stText = p.slice(6).join(",");
            var nums = p.slice(1, 6);
            var h =
                '<div class="cb-unit-name">' +
                esc(name) +
                '</div><div class="cb-unit-stats">';
            for (var i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
                h +=
                    '<div class="cb-stat-cell" title="' +
                    esc(hints[i]) +
                    '"><span class="cb-mini-chip">' +
                    esc(labs[i]) +
                    '</span><span class="cb-statv">' +
                    esc(nums[i] || "") +
                    "</span></div>";
            }
            h +=
                '<div class="cb-stat-cell cb-stat-cell--full" title="' +
                esc(hints[5]) +
                '"><span class="cb-mini-chip">状态</span><span class="cb-statv">' +
                esc(stText) +
                "</span></div></div>";
            card.innerHTML = h;
            host.appendChild(card);
        });
        var fb = root.querySelector(".cb-status-fallback");
        if (fb && host.children.length) fb.style.display = "none";
    })();
    </script>
        
        <details class="cb-fold">
            <summary class="cb-sum" tabindex="0">展开：原始协议串</summary>
            <div class="cb-long">$1</div>
        </details>
        <div class="cb-foot">战场实时体征与护甲、状态一览。</div>
    </section>
</body>
</html>
